# Publish-safe Valkyrie config template.
# Copy this file to `valk/valkyrie_config.md` locally and adjust the path there.
# The live `valk/valkyrie_config.md` file should stay ignored by git.

# This will contain configuration data for the valkyrie tooling library
# It features its own package manager as an alternative to nimble and advanced, local repo management
# Create this folder but dont put anything in yet

# Local submodule overrides generated by Valkyrie-Tooling

[submodule "submodules/Valkyrie-Tooling"]
  path = submodules/Valkyrie-Tooling
  url = C:/ChangeMe/Valkyrie-Tooling
